title: Automation to copy item from one board and create subitem in another board
excerpt: Hello everyone! We are using Monday.com to allow everyone in the business to organise their workload via individual boards. We want to be able to have a quick overview of the progress of what everyone is doing and to see…

posts.author: HollyElise (Holly Gregory)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello everyone! We are using Monday.com to allow everyone in the business to organise their workload via individual boards. We want to be able to have a quick overview of the progress of what everyone is doing and to see everyone’s tasks on one board. Is it possible to create an automation that copies subitems and puts them on another board under a particular item? Thanks in advance

posts.author: Michael-PT (Michael Albers)
posts.cookedHtml: ‘When this happens’ then copy item/subitem from board would be very nice. It would make it possible to create template boards that can be set up and used on other boards automatically.

posts.author: hroberts (Heather Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: My organization could greatly benefit from this feature.

posts.author: pat-alliancetech (Pat De Borja)
posts.cookedHtml: Do we have any updates on this feature? This is exactly what we are trying to do but to no avail.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @pat-alliancetech, @hroberts, @Michael-PT.

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. Here’s an example of you can use it to copy subitems to another item →

Screenshot 2024-04-05 at 18.15.222256×486 47.3 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
